## DFT Specification :
### 1. Transmission gate specification :
 - [x] $V_{dd} = 3.4 v$
 - [x] $V_{in max} = 3.3 v $
 - [x] $E_n-n = 0 v $
 - [x] $En_3 = 3.4 v $
 #### For the pmos : (hv)
  - [x] $W = 10 µ ; l= 0.45 µ$
 #### For the nmos :(hv)
  - [x] $W =4 µ ; l = 0.45 µ $
### 2. Buffer specification :
  - [x] Input $E_n = 1.2 v $
  - [x] $V_{dd} = 3.4 v $
 #### M5 transistor hv (pmos) :
  - [x] $w = 0.3 v ; l = 0.4 µ $
 #### M6 transistor hv(nmos) :
  - [x] $w = 2 µ ; l=0.45 µ $
 #### M7 transistor hv (pmos) :
  - [x] $w= 0.3 µ ; l= 0.4 µ $
 #### M8 transistor hv (nmos) :
  - [x] $w = 0.3 µ ; l = 0.45 µ $
